caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I CN NEVEDO SMUT" in white and red letters sits before a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing studio or shop, featuring a white mannequin wearing a white garment, several racks of clothing in the background, and numerous framed photographs on the wall. In the lower corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that reads "BORELY TOI." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his facial expression and slightly tilting his head as he looks toward someone or something off-camera to the left. The background and equipment remain stationary, with the only movement being the man's slight change in posture and expression.
